positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a lone, whimsical owl perched on a flowering branch under a twilight sky. The scene should feature a strong contrast between the solid silhouette of the owl and the vibrant, diffused pastel colors of the background nebula. The style is graphic vector art meets elegant watercolor wash, with deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasting against luminous gold and sage green accents. Emphasize clean lines, crisp edges for the subject, and a central, symmetrical composition. Overhead, subtle constellations formed by geometric lines connect the branches. Perfect for high-contrast apparel printing, with ample negative space for versatility. Highly detailed, octane render, graphic illustration, ultra-minimalist, 8k resolution.
